##NAMES=Sternbergite
##RRUFFID=R110137
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=AgFe_2_S_3_
##LOCALITY=Joachimsthal, Bohemia, Czechoslovakia
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=William W. Pinch
##DESCRIPTION=Black sectile single crystals with good cleavage, some with purple iridescence, associated with stephanite.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by single crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R110137
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 6.637 b: 11.685 c: 12.718 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 986.2 crystal system: orthorhombic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
